title: West Pharmaceutical says hackers stole data, encrypted systems
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services disclosed that it was the target of a cyberattack that resulted in data exfiltration and system encryption. [...]

title: Iranian hackers targeted major South Korean electronics maker
summary: The Iran-linked hacking group MuddyWater (a.k.a. Seedworm, Static Kitten) launched a broad cyber-espionage campaign targeting at least nine high-profile organizations across multiple sectors and countries. [...]

title: New critical Exim mailer flaw allows remote code execution
summary: A critical vulnerability affecting certain configurations of the Exim open-source mail transfer agent could be exploited by an unauthenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary code. [...]

title: Windows BitLocker zero-day gives access to protected drives, PoC released
summary: A cybersecurity researcher has published proof-of-concept (PoC) exploits for two unpatched Microsoft Windows vulnerabilities named YellowKey and GreenPlasma, which are a BitLocker bypass and a privilege-escalation flaw. [...]

title: Webinar tomorrow: Why security alone won't stop modern attacks
summary: Tomorrow's webinar examines why prevention alone is no longer enough against modern cyberattacks. The session explores how organizations combine security, backups, and recovery planning to improve cyber resilience after attacks. [...]

title: Microsoft fixes BitLocker recovery issue only for Windows 11 users
summary: Microsoft has addressed a known issue causing some Windows 11 systems to boot into BitLocker recovery after installing the April 2026 Windows security updates. [...]

title: Microsoft fixes Windows Autopatch bug installing restricted drivers
summary: Microsoft has fixed a Windows Autopatch bug that caused driver updates restricted by administrative policies to be deployed on some Autopatch-managed Windows devices in the European Union. [...]

title: Foxconn confirms cyberattack claimed by Nitrogen ransomware gang
summary: Foxconn, the world's largest electronics manufacturer, says some of its North American factories are now working to resume normal operations after a cyberattack. [...]

title: 73 Seconds to Breach, 24 Hours to Patch: The Case for Autonomous Validation
summary: Attackers can compromise systems in minutes while patching and response still take hours or days. Picus Security breaks down why autonomous validation is becoming critical for modern defense strategies. [...]

title: Microsoft says some users can't install Office on Windows 365 devices
summary: Microsoft says some customers are experiencing issues downloading and installing Office on their Windows 365 devices. [...]

title: US govt seeks Instructure testimony on massive Canvas cyberattack
summary: The U.S. House Committee on Homeland Security is calling on Instructure executives to testify about two cyberattacks by the ShinyHunters extortion group that targeted the company's Canvas platform, allowing threat actors to steal student data and disrupt schools during final exams. [...]

title: UK fines water supplier $1.3M for exposing data of 664k customers
summary: The Information Commissioner's Office has fined South Staffordshire Water Plc and parent company South Staffordshire Plc £963,900 ($1.3 million) over a cyberattack that exposed the personal data of 663,887 customers and employees. [...]

title: Webinar: Fixing the gaps in network incident response
summary: IT teams often struggle to quickly coordinate responses across disparate systems during network incidents. This upcoming webinar explores how automation and AI-assisted workflows can reduce response times and help prevent outages. [...]

title: Signal adds security warnings for social engineering, phishing attacks
summary: Signal has introduced new in-app confirmations and warning messages as additional safeguards against phishing and social engineering attempts that could lead to various forms of fraud. [...]

title: Microsoft releases Windows 10 KB5087544 extended security update
summary: Microsoft has released the Windows 10 KB5087544 extended security update to fix the May 2026 Patch Tuesday vulnerabilities and resolve an issue with the new Remote Desktop warnings. [...]
